The table shows the average number of people in a store each hour that it is open.

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
\multicolumn{7}{|c|}{\textbf{Average Number of People}} \\
\hline
19 & 32 & 27 & 37 & 45 & 39 & \\
\hline
35 & 29 & 31 & 30 & 32 & 28 & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\textbf{a.} Make a stem-and-leaf plot for the average number of people in the store.

\textbf{b.} Use the data to answer the question, ``What is the typical number of people in the store?''
